descriptionHtml:
Cranchi Atlantique 50 for sale 2010 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid | Very Good Condition

-LOW ENGINE HOURS (300 hours)-

"x2 VOLVO PENTA 670HP"

If you’re looking for a spacious, well-equipped motor yacht for extended cruising, the Cranchi Atlantique 50 for sale 2010 is definitely worth considering. Manufactured by Cranchi in 2010, this Atlantique 50 represents a refined combination of Italian design and quality craftsmanship (Autopilot, Bow Thruster, Air Conditioning, Inverter, Generator, Dishwasher, Washing Machine, Grill...). She is currently offered in very good condition with notably low engine hours, making her an appealing option for anyone in search of a reliable and comfortable offshore yacht.

Specifications:

  • Manufacturer: Cranchi
  • Year built: 2010
  • Condition: Very good, low engine hours (300 h)
  • Length x Beam: 15.01 m x 2.66 m
  • Draft: 1.30 m
  • Bridge clearance: 4.18 m
  • Displacement: 18,850 kg
  • CE marking: B - Offshore
  • Material: GRP
  • Max no. of persons: 12
  • Headroom: 180 cm
  • Cabins: 3
  • Berths: 6
  • Bathrooms: 2
  • Freshwater tank: 560 l
  • Waste Water Holding Tank: 150 l
  • Propulsion: Inboard Direct Drive
  • Engine: Volvo Penta 2 x 670 HP / 493 kW
  • Fuel: 1,560 l Diesel
  • Engine Hours: 300 h

Equipment highlights:

  • Shore power, generator, battery charger, inverter
  • Fire suppression, bilge pump, life raft
  • Washing machine, dishwasher, fridge, freezer, stove, microwave
  • Air conditioning, hot water, electric toilet
  • Bow thruster, trim tabs, autopilot, GPS, chartplotter, fish finder, depth sounder
  • Cockpit table, wet bar, grill, teak deck, swim platform, gangway, bimini and flybridge covers
  • TV, radio, CD/DVD/MP3/iPod, Bluetooth, cockpit speakers

The Cranchi Atlantique 50 for sale 2010 is ready for her next owner and promises many more years of enjoyable cruising in style and comfort. For anyone seeking a spacious, well-maintained yacht with minimal mechanical wear, she’s a great choice. Contact us now to book your viewing or for more details!
